subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-04-29
subcodes.first_line: It will be very beneficial to the Cause if a tie of correspondence is established between the German and the American Baha'ís. Spiritual correspondence must be continued
subcodes.first_line_orig: خیلی خوب است بین دوستان آلمان و امریکا مکاتبه شود تا مزید الفت و ارتباط قلوب گردد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
